name: NitroVar
description: NitroVar is a new and improved wellness supplement with a synergistic blend of clinically backed, natural ingredients. It provides a Triple-Action Shield for Liver Vitality, Immune Strength, and Hangover Relief using Young Broccoli Sprouts, Young Asparagus Sprout, Grape Seeds, Antromax™ Antrodia Cinnamomea & Turmacin® Turmeric Extract.

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet twice daily after meal (liver detox), 2 sachets twice daily after meal (immune modulation)
dosage.general: Mix sachet with 125ml water or juice (below 40°C)

ingredients: Mixed Berries Juice Powder (Raspberry, Blueberry, Blackberry)
who_can_consume: People with liver concerns, alcohol drinkers, immunocompromised individuals, those with fatigue.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have underlying health conditions.

qa.question: How do I take NitroVar for hangover prevention?
qa.answer: For hangover prevention, take 1 sachet 30 minutes before alcohol ingestion and 1 sachet after alcohol ingestion. Mix with 125ml of water or juice below 40°C.

qa.question: What are the dosage options for different needs?
qa.answer: General health maintenance: 1 sachet once daily after meal. Liver detox: 1 sachet twice daily after meal. Immune modulation: 2 sachets twice daily after meal.
